title: Rainbow Airport - Mario Kart 8 Texture Hack
description:
Music was NOT included in the pack and was replaced by me via Cafiine.
Texture Hack done, once again, by https://twitter.com/MegaMew_

If someone wants the BFSTM files I made especially for this track, here you go: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1l9WIisq5vF_kYZ_22f1KywmZoi71msCW/view?usp=sharing
Keep in mind that they are a bit too loud tho (as you hear in the video), sorry bout that.
